data/maps/PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1.PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Wha: What color is your TRAINER'S CARD?\nMine's copper!
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1.PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_OnC: PACIFIDLOG TOWN floats on top of\na colony of CORSOLA.\pIf I told you that, would you believe me?
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1.PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Anc: The ancestors of the people in\nPACIFIDLOG were said to have been\lborn on boats and then lived and died \laboard them.\pI understand that they lived that way\nbecause they were searching for\lsomething.
